inline_comments.message:
shouldn't be better to evaluate if the no_proxy or NO_PROXY environment variable has been defined?

    if [[ $no_proxy ]]; then

or 

    if [[ $NO_PROXY ]]; then

Well, I think that we want to add this if any proxy, including http_proxy and https_proxy has been defined actually. Even if no_proxy hasn't been added yet we know this will be an internal address and we should add no_proxy to the env. I think this way might be cleaner than

if [[ $http_proxy ]] || [[ $https_proxy ]] || [ $HTTP__PROXY ]] ... etc

What do you think?
